files.name: priority_encoder_case.sv
files.content:
// Lowest numbered request has priority. WIDTH must be between 1 and 32.
module priority_encoder_case #(
    parameter int unsigned WIDTH = 32,
    parameter int unsigned INDEX_WIDTH = (WIDTH <= 1) ? 1 : $clog2(WIDTH)
) (
    input  logic [WIDTH-1:0]       requests,
    output logic [WIDTH-1:0]       one_hot,
    output logic [INDEX_WIDTH-1:0] index,
    output logic                   valid
);

  logic [31:0] requests_padded;
  logic [31:0] one_hot_padded;

  always_comb begin
    requests_padded = '0;
    requests_padded[WIDTH-1:0] = requests;
    one_hot_padded = '0;
    index = '0;
    valid = 1'b1;

    casez (requests_padded)
      32'b???????????????????????????????1: begin one_hot_padded[0]  = 1'b1; index = 0;  end
      32'b??????????????????????????????10: begin one_hot_padded[1]  = 1'b1; index = 1;  end
      32'b?????????????????????????????100: begin one_hot_padded[2]  = 1'b1; index = 2;  end
      32'b????????????????????????????1000: begin one_hot_padded[3]  = 1'b1; index = 3;  end
      32'b???????????????????????????10000: begin one_hot_padded[4]  = 1'b1; index = 4;  end
      32'b??????????????????????????100000: begin one_hot_padded[5]  = 1'b1; index = 5;  end
      32'b?????????????????????????1000000: begin one_hot_padded[6]  = 1'b1; index = 6;  end
      32'b????????????????????????10000000: begin one_hot_padded[7]  = 1'b1; index = 7;  end
      32'b???????????????????????100000000: begin one_hot_padded[8]  = 1'b1; index = 8;  end
      32'b??????????????????????1000000000: begin one_hot_padded[9]  = 1'b1; index = 9;  end
      32'b?????????????????????10000000000: begin one_hot_padded[10] = 1'b1; index = 10; end
      32'b????????????????????100000000000: begin one_hot_padded[11] = 1'b1; index = 11; end
      32'b???????????????????1000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[12] = 1'b1; index = 12; end
      32'b??????????????????10000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[13] = 1'b1; index = 13; end
      32'b?????????????????100000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[14] = 1'b1; index = 14; end
      32'b????????????????1000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[15] = 1'b1; index = 15; end
      32'b???????????????10000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[16] = 1'b1; index = 16; end
      32'b??????????????100000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[17] = 1'b1; index = 17; end
      32'b?????????????1000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[18] = 1'b1; index = 18; end
      32'b????????????10000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[19] = 1'b1; index = 19; end
      32'b???????????100000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[20] = 1'b1; index = 20; end
      32'b??????????1000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[21] = 1'b1; index = 21; end
      32'b?????????10000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[22] = 1'b1; index = 22; end
      32'b????????100000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[23] = 1'b1; index = 23; end
      32'b???????1000000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[24] = 1'b1; index = 24; end
      32'b??????10000000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[25] = 1'b1; index = 25; end
      32'b?????100000000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[26] = 1'b1; index = 26; end
      32'b????1000000000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[27] = 1'b1; index = 27; end
      32'b???10000000000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[28] = 1'b1; index = 28; end
      32'b??100000000000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[29] = 1'b1; index = 29; end
      32'b?1000000000000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[30] = 1'b1; index = 30; end
      32'b10000000000000000000000000000000: begin one_hot_padded[31] = 1'b1; index = 31; end
      default: valid = 1'b0;
    endcase

    one_hot = one_hot_padded[WIDTH-1:0];
  end

endmodule
